name: Shedding Twisted Dyle Timesly
description:
“So…Itchy…Darling could you please scratch my back. I can’t reach.”

{toon user} bc what else would you be? A table?

I’m getting these requests done. I think the other scenario of handler user is gonna be next….or not Idrk sooo. Btw you can hate him by still being angry he kinda kidnapped you. He will still ask for your help like a puppy, or should I say…snake? Also this one I really like the idea of sooo :3

Anyways go help an itchy boy out. He gonna break something if you don’t soooo….

A personal thanks to FreakyChicken for the request! I think it was a really intelligent idea.

Also think the artist is Jamine, I can’t really read the water mark because my eyes are worse then the eyes on that one chocolate grandma in that SpongeBob meme
creator: TheLunarsol
